# teamCreate

Creates a new team. The user who creates the team will automatically be added as a member to the newly created team.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`TeamPayload`](../objects/team_payload-object.md)!

## Arguments

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `copySettingsFromTeamId` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md) | `n/a` | No | The team id to copy settings from, if any. |
| `input` | [`TeamCreateInput`](../input-objects/team_create_input-input.md)! | `n/a` | No | The team object to create. |
